d9c6cd45e64ac735","dweb:/ipfs/Qmd8y89ij3aahVUjjaVcQ3YBDSFbThx75fqFyaFHbvsYrm"]}},"version":1}

params.indexOracleKey: keccak256 of the index price ticker (e.g., keccak256("BTC_INDEX"))
params.oracleKey: keccak256 of the mark price ticker (e.g., keccak256("BTC"))

params.trader: Address of the trader to liquidate

params.isLong: True for long, false for short
params.size: Notional position size in G$ (e.g., 10000e18 = $10k long BTC)

returns.pnl: Positive = profit, negative = loss (net of funding)

MAINTENANCE_MARGIN_BPS().notice: Minimum maintenance margin: 2% → liquidatable below this

closePosition(uint256).notice: Close an open position and settle PnL + funding.

marginRatio(address,uint256).notice: Get current margin ratio in BPS (e.g., 500 = 5%), including pending funding.         Matches the health calculation used in liquidate() — suitable for liquidation bots.

unrealizedPnL(address,uint256).notice: Get unrealized PnL for a position, including pending funding payments.
